headlines.title: Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
headlines.summary: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.

headlines.title: Israel launches Tehran strikes, hours after first statement from new Iran supreme leader released
headlines.summary: The message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei was read by a presenter on Iranian state TV.

headlines.title: France's ghost car scandal that allowed one million illegal vehicles onto the roads
headlines.summary: Fake dealerships were manipulating the state vehicle licensing agency's official records, France's auditor has found.

headlines.title: Parents accused of hiding daughter's HIV infection and neglect
headlines.summary: The child did not see a doctor until she was six and had not had any vaccinations.

headlines.title: Emirati minister tells BBC Iran must end strikes on Gulf
headlines.summary: The UAE says more than 1,800 drones and missiles have been projected at the country since the war began.

headlines.title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
headlines.summary: The Rastriya Swatatantra Party has won a large majority in an election dominated by issues including corruption.

headlines.title: Israeli military drops charges against soldiers accused of abusing Palestinian detainee
headlines.summary: The Israeli military's top lawyer cites exceptional circumstances for dropping the case involving a Palestinian man held at Sde Teiman military prison.

headlines.title: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
headlines.summary: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.

headlines.title: Nineteen jailed over deadly Moscow concert attack
headlines.summary: Gunmen opened fire at Crocus City Concert hall near Moscow in 2024, killing 149 and injuring more than 500.

headlines.title: US missile hit military base near Iran school, video analysis shows
headlines.summary: A US Tomahawk missile hit a military base near a primary school in southern Iran where Iranian authorities said 168 people were killed.

headlines.title: Suspect dead after ramming vehicle into Jewish temple in Michigan
headlines.summary: Police have not named the suspect or identified a motive for driving a vehicle into the synagogue, where it caught fire.

headlines.title: UK troops at Iraq base shot down Iranian drones, Healey says
headlines.summary: British forces based in Iraq shot down two drones overnight, Defence Secretary John Healey has confirmed.

headlines.title: King expresses 'concern' over Alberta separatists in meeting with First Nations chiefs
headlines.summary: One First Nation has sued the province of Alberta, arguing that allowing a possible referendum on separating from Canada is a violation of indigenous rights.

headlines.title: 'What if we're left with ruins?': Doubts creep in for Iranians who supported war
headlines.summary: Teachers, engineers and shopkeepers tell the BBC they fear Iran falling into chaos.

headlines.title: How Iran war laid bare the world's reliance on Gulf oil and gas
headlines.summary: Countries around the world are feeling the impact of the conflict and the resulting energy price shock.

headlines.title: War in Ukraine spills into Hungarian election campaign
headlines.summary: Hungary is going to the polls soon and Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has one public enemy in his sights — Ukraine's president.

headlines.title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
headlines.summary: The Rastriya Swatatantra Party has won a large majority in an election dominated by issues including corruption.

headlines.title: Video shows moment point-blank gunshot misses Indian politician
headlines.summary: Senior Kashmir leader Farooq Abdullah escaped unhurt after the incident and the suspect is in custody.

headlines.title: Bodies of two Chinese backpackers found in Australian floodwaters
headlines.summary: The pair had been reported missing on Tuesday after failing to reach their destination.

headlines.title: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
headlines.summary: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.

headlines.title: What did we learn from China's biggest political meeting?
headlines.summary: BBC correspondents give their biggest takeaways from China's National People's Congress.

headlines.title: 'The situation is dire': War on Iran squeezes India's cooking-gas supplies
headlines.summary: The shockwaves of the US-Israeli strikes on Iran are being felt in India's kitchens.

headlines.title: India's top court allows removal of life support of man in vegetative state
headlines.summary: Harish Rana has been in a vegetative state since 2013, when he fell from a balcony and suffered head injuries.

headlines.title: India's IndiGo airline CEO resigns months after mass cancellation crisis
headlines.summary: The airline said Peiter Elbers stepped down for personal reasons, without sharing further details.

headlines.title: China and North Korea to reopen passenger train service after pandemic halt
headlines.summary: Tickets for the first train departing on Thursday have reportedly sold out.

headlines.title: Inside the Australian hotel where Iranian footballers escaped to claim asylum
headlines.summary: Activists played a key role in making contact with the women as they tried to dodge their minders.

headlines.title: The final voyage of the Iranian warship sunk by the US
headlines.summary: The sinking of an Iranian ship by the US near Sri Lanka brings the conflict uncomfortably close to India.

headlines.title: UK troops at Iraq base shot down Iranian drones, Healey says
headlines.summary: British forces based in Iraq shot down two drones overnight, Defence Secretary John Healey has confirmed.

headlines.title: Mother is jailed for enslaving woman for 25 years
headlines.summary: Mandy Wixon, 56, forced the victim to clean her squalid home and subjected her to a miserable life.

headlines.title: Jo Malone sued for using her own name in collaboration with Zara
headlines.summary: The perfumier sold the rights to her name in 1999 but has previously said she regretted the move.

headlines.title: British man charged in Dubai for alleged filming of Iranian missiles
headlines.summary: Foreign Office officials are understood to be supporting his family.

headlines.title: PM says Mandelson appointment was mistake as No 10 denies cover-up
headlines.summary: Documents show Sir Keir Starmer was warned the peer's relationship with Jeffrey Epstein posed a reputational risk.

headlines.title: Lloyds, Bank of Scotland and Halifax apps showed customers other users' transactions
headlines.summary: Lloyds Banking Group customers reported being able to view payments and charges from other sources.

headlines.title: UK asylum appeal backlog at record high of 80,000
headlines.summary: Home Office statistics show more than 80,333 people were waiting for appeals to be heard at the end of 2025.

headlines.title: Wuthering Heights uni module given content warning for students
headlines.summary: A Cardiff University module featuring Wuthering Heights carries 'distressing content' warning.

headlines.title: Sly fox sneaks on to cargo ship in Southampton and arrives in New York
headlines.summary: The animal that stowed away on the vessel is now in the care of the Bronx Zoo with veterinary staff.

headlines.title: Student loans inquiry to look at whether system is 'unfair to graduates'
headlines.summary: The Treasury Committee will look at whether the goalposts have been moved in a way which is unfair.

headlines.title: UK does not 'agree with Trump on every issue' - Cooper
headlines.summary: Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper has hit back at President Trump's criticism of the UK response to the conflict in Iran.

headlines.title: My identity was stolen and someone is using it to catfish men - it's terrifying
headlines.summary: For four years, Sasha-Jay's photos have been stolen from social media to impersonate her online.
